sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8062" key="a)ne/gersis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέγ-ερσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8062.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">raising up,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.156b</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n8062.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">waking up,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">378f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
